article_meta.title: Metro An open letter from the heart of Iran to America – Don’t give up on us By California Post Staff Published March 7, 2026, 7:11 p.m

reasoning: The summary mostly attributes viewpoints to the author and uses neutral phrasing, avoiding the article’s overtly celebratory and inflammatory language. However, it includes a few un-attributed or loaded elements (e.g., stating Ahmadinejad and Khamenei were killed as fact; using “brutal crackdowns”) and adopts “regime” language without distancing. Overall, it’s more neutral than the source but not perfectly distanced.

custom_reasoning.spin: Generally neutral verbs; minor loaded phrasing like “brutal crackdowns” and “regime violence.”
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: Presents contested or single-source claims (killings of Khamenei/Ahmadinejad; use of mosques as storage) as facts without attribution.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: Mostly attributed to the author; one subjective descriptor (“brutal”) appears in the model’s voice.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: Does not amplify the article’s celebratory or extreme tone; language remains measured.
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No personal attacks in the model’s voice.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: No claims about internal motives beyond what the author states.
custom_reasoning.slant: Article is one-sided; summary reflects that without further imbalance.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Captures the article’s main perspective; little to omit since it’s a single-voice piece.
custom_reasoning.word_choice: Some loaded terms like “regime” repeated; otherwise neutral vocabulary.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Negative elements mirror the source; not exaggerated.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: No deference to elites or dismissal of grassroots beyond the source’s framing.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: More neutral than the source but includes a few non-distanced claims and minor loaded terms.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Only one perspective exists, but sources_represented lists “New York Post” (outlet) rather than the author’s perspective, reducing accuracy.
